query: hey can you scan the code quality of this project? i want to know if there's any duplication or dead code before I push to main
run jscpd on the project, I think there's a lot of copy-paste in the components folder and I want to see the duplication rate
I just finished implementing the posts CRUD feature. Can you check if I left any unused exports or dead dependencies behind? knip should catch that
the codebase feels messy after 3 weeks of rapid development. can you give me a quality report? cognitive complexity, duplicates, unused stuff — the works
is there any dead code in my project? I've been refactoring and I'm worried there are leftover exports nobody uses anymore
j'ai l'impression qu'on a beaucoup de copier-coller dans le code, surtout dans les server actions. tu peux vérifier avec jscpd ou un truc du genre ?
before we merge this feature branch, run a quality scan on just the modified files to make sure we're not introducing tech debt
generate a quality-report.md for the whole project — I need to share the code health status with the team
check how clean the codebase is. I want to know duplication percentage, any unused deps, and if there are functions that are too complex
lance les outils de qualité sur tout le projet et génère moi un rapport avec le statut PASS/WARN/FAIL
write unit tests for the auth module — I need tests for the login, signup, and password reset flows using vitest
deploy the app to production on vercel, make sure the environment variables are set correctly
there's a bug where users can't sign in with Google OAuth — the callback URL seems wrong. can you fix it?
run eslint on this file and fix all the errors automatically — I want you to actually change the code, not just report problems
this function has too many nested ifs, can you refactor it to reduce the complexity? maybe extract some helper functions
review this pull request for code quality issues — check the diff on GitHub and leave comments on anything that looks wrong
run the E2E tests with agent-browser to check if the user registration flow works end to end on localhost:3000
I need to add a new API endpoint for user profiles at /api/users/[id] with GET and PATCH methods
can you look at the eslint config and add the no-console rule? I keep accidentally leaving console.logs in production code
generate a recette checklist from the spec to validate that the posts feature meets all acceptance criteria
